description: Reports what modules/packages/env vars are available in this AIDP runtime. Use it to diagnose 'aidputils.secrets not available' and similar wiring issues before opening a ticket.

tools.description: Introspects the live AIDP runtime. No inputs required. Returns a structured dict with: python version, available modules (aidputils, aidputils.secrets, datahub_dp_python_client, oci.*, oracledb, requests), set/unset env vars (OCI_RESOURCE_PRINCIPAL_VERSION, OCI_HUB_DP_ENDPOINT, DATALAKE_ID, ...), and live probes (can we build a resource-principal signer? can we reach aidputils.secrets.get?).

schema.name: probe_credential_name
schema.description: Optional. A credential name to attempt resolving via aidputils.secrets.get() — used to distinguish 'module missing' from 'credential missing'. Defaults to a deliberately nonexistent name.
